things.name: Kelvingrove Art Gallery & Museum
things.description: Scotland's most visited museum with 22 themed galleries including armour and Dali's Christ

things.name: Burrell Collection
things.description: Internationally renowned art collection of 9,000 objects in a stunning park setting

things.name: Glasgow Cathedral
things.description: Finest example of medieval Gothic architecture in Scotland, dating to 1136

things.name: Riverside Museum
things.description: Zaha Hadid-designed transport museum on the banks of the Clyde

things.name: George Square
things.description: City's main civic square surrounded by Victorian architecture and statues

things.name: Necropolis
things.description: Victorian cemetery on a hill overlooking the cathedral with panoramic city views

things.name: Glasgow Science Centre
things.description: Award-winning science centre with IMAX and a rotating observation tower

things.name: Pollok House
things.description: Exquisite Edwardian country house with a superb collection of Spanish paintings

things.name: Botanic Gardens
things.description: Victorian gardens with the stunning Kibble Palace glasshouse on the River Kelvin

things.name: Mackintosh at the Willow
things.description: Beautifully restored tearoom designed by Charles Rennie Mackintosh
